title: Idun Works
excerpt: Small studio, big ideas. We build fast, beautiful websites that you actually own.
meta_title: Idun Works — Websites that are fast, honest, and yours
meta_description: We build blazingly fast websites with the Idun CMS. No bloat, no lock-in, no surprises.

settings.title: Websites that are fast, honest, and yours.
settings.subtitle: No bloat. No lock-in. No surprises.

settings.heading: Why Idun?
settings.description: We got tired of bloated platforms that promise everything and deliver headaches. So we built our own.

cards.title: 🚀 Blazing Fast
cards.subtitle: Built on modern tech, not 20-year-old PHP spaghetti. Your visitors feel the difference.

cards.title: 🔓 No Lock-in
cards.subtitle: Your site, your data, your code. Walk away anytime — but you won't want to.

cards.title: 💸 Honest Pricing
cards.subtitle: What you see is what you pay. No surprise upsells, no premium tiers for basic features.

cards.title: 🧹 Zero Bloat
cards.subtitle: No 47 plugins to load a contact form. Toggle what you need on, leave the rest off.

settings.content:
25 years. One dev. One AI. No BS.

We've installed, configured, cursed at, and contributed to roughly 30 different CMS platforms over 25 years. WordPress, Drupal, Joomla, Ghost, Strapi, Sanity — you name it, we've built on it.

They all start with “this is the future” and end with lock-in, bloat, and compromise. So we built Idun — a CMS that does what you actually need, blazingly fast, without the baggage.

Tibbe brings 25 years of web craft. Buttler brings tireless AI precision. Together, we build websites that respect both the maker and the visitor.

settings.title: Ready for a site that doesn't suck?
settings.description: Tell us what you need. We'll tell you honestly if we're the right fit.
